summary: Comprehensive testing of King Choreography website completed. Backend API testing shows 9/10 endpoints working correctly. Frontend testing shows all core pages and flows working properly. Admin authentication, application submission, and service submission flows are fully functional.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns invalid JSON response causing parsing error
flaky_endpoints.impact: Admin dashboard stats may not display correctly
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: JSON parsing error: 'Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)'

passed_tests: API root endpoint returns running status
GET /api/services returns all seeded services (3+ found)
POST /api/applications creates new application with required fields
Admin login with wrong credentials returns 401
Price calculation for Review & Feedback client rate ($150)
Price calculation for Virtual Upgrade (5 athletes x $40 = $200)
POST /api/submissions creates submission with calculated price
GET /api/admin/applications returns application list with auth
Homepage loads with hero section and dual CTAs
Apply page loads with complete application form
Submit page loads with multi-step submission form (5 steps)
Admin login page loads with login form
Admin login flow works with redirect to dashboard
Navigation works between all pages (About, Services, FAQ, Contact)
success_percentage: Backend: 90% (9/10 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all core flows working)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin stats endpoint JSON response issue. The endpoint may be returning empty response or malformed JSON causing parsing errors.
